name: Goff Academy
about:
Goff Academy is a premier golf instruction and club fitting facility led by PGA Professional Drew Goff, located within Audubon Park Golf Course in New Orleans. The academy utilizes advanced technology, specifically Foresight's GC Quad Launch Monitor, to provide expert swing analysis and indoor simulator training. The facility focuses on improving skills for players of all levels through private lessons, group packages, and on-course instruction.

The venue is designed for serious game improvement, offering a fully equipped indoor swing room for video analysis and data tracking, as well as access to the adjoining Audubon Park course for real-world scenario training. Goff Academy emphasizes a comprehensive approach to the game, covering full swing, short game, and putting mechanics. Whether looking for private lessons or custom club fittings, the academy provides a professional environment focused on player development and technical mastery.
why_golfers_like_it: High-end Foresight GC Quad launch monitor technology
PGA Professional instruction with extensive playing and coaching credentials
Indoor swing room for all-weather training
On-course instruction available at Audubon Park
Tailored lessons for juniors and adults

food_and_drink.notes: Not available on-site; located within a public golf course which may have separate amenities.

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for launch monitor simulator analysis and instruction.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While bringing your own clubs is recommended for fittings and lessons, you should contact the academy directly regarding availability of rental equipment for lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The facility is focused on professional instruction; food and drink policies are not explicitly stated but typically outside food is not permitted in indoor training areas.

faq.question: How long does a typical lesson last?
faq.answer: Lessons are available in 30-minute and 1-hour durations.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Goff Academy offers specific junior lessons and group packages tailored for youth players.
